source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Consider an abrupt PN junction (at \( T = 300 \text{K} \)) shown in the figure. The depletion region width \( X_n \) on the N-side of the junction is \( 0.2 \, \mu \text{m} \) and the permittivity of silicon (\( \epsilon_{\text{si}} \)) is \( 1.044 \times 10^{-12} \, \text{F/cm} \). At the junction, the approximate value of the peak electric field (in kV/cm) is ____.
extraction_notes: image field is a PIL image object representation, not a path or URL

final answer is requested in kV/cm, so unit handling/conversion is part of the solution
